title: Flowing
writer: Toshirô Ide, Aya Kôda, Sumie Tanaka
actors: Kinuyo Tanaka, Isuzu Yamada, Hideko Takamine
plot: Otsuta is running the geisha house Tsuta in Tokyo. Her business is heavily in debt. Her daughter Katsuyo doesn't see any future in her mothers trade in the late days of Geisha. But Otsuta will not give up. This film portraits the ...
